body:
I am facing a similar issue while running pylint with the following setup:

Python 3.12
pip 24.0
pylint==3.2.2
astroid==3.2.4

While running pylint, it is failing with the below error:

astroid.exceptions.AstroidBuildingError: Building error when trying to create ast representation of module 'app.tasks.classic_subnet_mgmt'

Previously, pylint was working successfully, but after upgrading to Python 3.12 and updating dependencies, this issue started occurring.

comments.body: Would it be possible to provide more information on the code where pylint is run on? A minimum case reproducing the issue would be extremely helpful.

I am running this in a cloud environment and have added the necessary details in the requirements folder:

pylint==3.2.2
astroid==3.2.4

I am installing the dependencies using the following command, and the installation completes successfully:

pip install -r requirements/dev.txt -r requirements/tests.txt --upgrade --upgrade-strategy eager

However, during linting, pylint throws an error:
```
 raise self._exception
astroid.exceptions.AstroidError
>>> Command: pylint -j 6 celery/app celery/tests flask/app flask/tests common/ tests_common/
ic4v_invoke pylint 2>&1 - return code = 1
```

I'm not sure what you mean by requirements folder, but I assume you forgot to add it to your message ? There's a stacktrace when astroid crash, please provide that (we're not going to be able to retro-engineer your code only from the stacktrace, only what type of node is failing). Or provide a minimal reproducer. But we won't be able to reproduce with only the final error message and the command launched.

title: astroid.exceptions.AstroidBuildingError: while using python 3.12
